data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for fast owner and biz audit query paths.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Fast owner and biz audit query paths', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for fast query paths, yet there are no supporting details in the prior steps to demonstrate their implementation, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of fast owner and biz audit query paths.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
